goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'trinity college'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
The train should 'arrive by 11:15' and should go to 'ely'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called trinity college
Make sure you get attraction type
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on wednesday
The train should arrive by 11:15 and should go to ely
Make sure you get travel time and price
